response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development but does not meet the mandatory C++ requirement for this role, as their recent work is primarily in TypeScript, JavaScript, Node.js, and D language. While they have some C/C++ experience from early in their career (National Instruments) and thesis work, it does not meet the 5–10 years of professional C++ development on Windows platforms specified in the job description. Their domain experience is also not aligned with capital markets or fixed income systems.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background with experience in TDD, CI/CD, and agile methodologies
Proven ability to work across multiple languages and technologies, demonstrating versatility
Experience with scalable systems, microservices, and real-time data handling
concerns: No recent or sufficient C++ experience (5–10 years) on Windows platforms, which is a mandatory requirement
Lacks domain expertise in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income systems
No mention of SQL Server or Oracle experience, which are required for this role
